FLOOR_COVERING.ImprovementComponentConditionDescription: All floors were updated at the same time as other interior work was performed.

PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL.UnitValuationCommentText: Additional commentary can be added here, if needed by Appraiser.

ROOM_DETAIL.RoomQualityDescription: Tile shower and custom vanity, owners utilized custom designer for tile work.
GE Monogram appliances and hardwood painted cabinets.

STRUCTURE_DETAIL.StructureValuationCommentText: The structure's overall condition is adequately maintained, with several areas that have been updated. There were no noticeable areas of defects within the structure that required repairs at the time of inspection.

MARKET_DETAIL.MarketBoundariesDescription: Kinross Avenue to the North; Malcolm Avenue to the East; Ohio Avenue to the South; The 405 to the West
MARKET_DETAIL.MarketInventorySearchParameterDescriptio: The market search was limited by the following factors: Properties that included between 1-2 full bathrooms, 2-3 bedrooms, that were built between 1960 and 1985 with a closing date between 09/18/2018 and 09/17/2019.

PARCEL_SUMMARY_DETAIL.ParcelsLegalDescription: Tract Number 31313 - Unit Number 202, Parking Spaces G22, G23.

PROJECT_ANALYSIS.ProjectConditionAndQualityDescription: There is on-going renovation of balconies on the building due to settlement cracking.

PROJECT_DETAIL.ProjectDwellingUnitsRentedEstimateDescri: The appraiser was unable to obtain an exact count of renters due to incomplete data on the Condo Questionnaire.

DEFECT_DETAIL.DefectItemDescription: Peeling paint was observed in one of the bedrooms of unit. Appears to be typical deferred maintenance.

Balcony is functional, but shows overall age and some deferred maintenance, mainly from the cracking of concrete. The condo association has systematically been moving throughout the building and making repairs as needed throughout all unit balconies.

PROPERTY_DETAIL.FunctionalIssueDescription: Additional commentary can be added here, if needed by Appraiser.

SITE_FEATURE_DETAIL.SiteFeatureDescription: Exotic trees and premium shrubs are sited along the foundation of the building.

SITE_INFLUENCE_DETAIL.SiteInfluenceDescription: Subject is surrounded by other similar, mid-rise apartment buildings.

SITE_ZONING_DETAIL.SiteZoningClassificationDescription: Mid-rise Condominium; 12 units per acre average

PROPERTY_NOT_USED_DETAIL.AdditionalPropertyAnalyzedNotUsedText: Superior utility resulted in a higher sale price.
Was listed as a "fixer upper" by the agent.
Much larger unit that was recently renovated.

SALES_COMPARISON_APPROACH_DETAIL.SalesComparisonCommentDescription: Comp #1 was a model match within the subject building, and was relied upon the most to develop the final opinion of value. Since the subject project is subject to an ongoing special assessment, known details were provided within the grid, resulting in no measurable impact to value. Comp #3 is a competing unit within the subject's market segment, of similar utility. Comp #4 is a current listing of a very similar unit, but is from a project with a higher predominant value, warranting an approximately 5% adjustment.

VALUATION_COMMENTARY.ValuationCommentText: Negligible Impact: Project Building Repairs for rehabilitation of all balconies in the project. Term of special assessment is 2 years.

There is existing litigation due to a contract dispute with a roofing company that has worked on the property. The litigation concerns an issue of non-payment for repairs made to the subject building.
Commercial space is a convenience store
The total special assessment for the unit is $3,160. This outstanding special assessment is considered typical for this type of building in this market area, so no further analysis is necessary.
The common elements appear to be adequately maintained. Within this project you have access to parking spaces adequate for the size of the community and have access to a common pool and spa area.
Maintenance of exterior amenities is provided by the homeowners association.

The subject's condominium unit is part of an apartment/multifamily building. The ANSI measurement standard does not apply to apartment/multifamily buildings. Dimensions provided in the floor plan are interior perimeter unit measurements.
Additional commentary can be added here, if needed by Appraiser.
Additional commentary can be added here, if needed by Appraiser.
The area is residential with similar housing stock which appears to have been accepted by the market.
Additional commentary can be added here, if needed by Appraiser.
Additional commentary can be added here, if needed by Appraiser.
Additional commentary can be added here, if needed by Appraiser.

Subject location is close to public transportation and employment centers, resulting in high demand for housing under $1 million. The identified market segment covers the bedroom community outside southeast LA.
Additional commentary can be added here, if needed by Appraiser.
The overall quality and condition of the subject building does not adversely affect the overall ratings provided.
There has been little fluctuation in the market during the past 4 years.

There was no information regarding material changes to Comparable #2 made known to the appraiser. Concerning Comparable #3, a kitchen remodel occurred prior to the most recent transfer, supporting an increase in price.

VALUATION_RECONCILIATION_DETAIL.ValuationReconciliationSummaryCommentDes: Utilize this subsection for additional commentary as required by USPAP.

VALUATION_REPORT_DETAIL.AppraiserPriorServicesPerformedDescripti: Performed an appraisal for refinance purposes in 2017.
VALUATION_REPORT_DETAIL.MeasurementStandardPublisherTypeOtherDes: Not Applicable due to property type
